stemHtml: What is the purpose of the take-off warning system? It is to help ensure that…

options.a: in case the take-off must be abandoned, it is done when below V<sub>1</sub>.
options.b: take-off is attempted in appropriate and safe configurations.
options.c: correct take-off power is set at the start of the take-off run.
options.d: there is enough runway to safely attempt a take-off.
